name: Tomato-Seafood Stew
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Tomatoes, cut up, canned (dashes of hot sauce)
20 oz Whole baby clams, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen shrimp, thaw them first.
2. Halve the length of the shrimp.
3. In a large saucepan, cook onion and garlic in oil until tender.
4. Stir in undrained tomatoes, tomato sauce, potato, green pepper, celery, carrot, thyme, pepper, and hot sauce.
5. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
7. Stir in shrimp and clams.
8. Return heat and cover; simmer for an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until shrimp turns pink.
9. Serve in bowls.
